name: R2 via Riverside Lane
notes: Blocked by debris and standing water for the next 4 hours.

name: R4 via Hill School Road
notes: Best current access for light vehicles to Hill School shelter.

name: R6 via Market Road
notes: Passable but slow due to waterlogging near the bus depot.

name: R2 over Canal Bridge
notes: Blocked by overflow and debris near Canal Road.

name: R4 via East Bypass
notes: Open for emergency vehicles with an estimated 18 minute travel time to Zone A.

name: Market Lane footpath
notes: Passable on foot only and not recommended for vehicle movement after sunset.
